meaning: n.胜利者adj.胜利者的 Victor 维克托(男子名)
examples: You know the saying, "To the victor belong the spoils"?
Victor Hugo used Notre-Dame as the setting of his famous story.
Victor Owens discovered early on the value of working at a company from every angle.
Brian Atwood and Keith Schuette to Nicaraguan Foreign Minister Victor Hugo Tinoco, 16 January 1990.
